beats.caption: Helmor — connected to docker-linux-arm64, no agent runtime yet
Reinstall → sha256-verified tar-stream over SSH, atomic per-file
Everything lands in $HOME/.helmor/server/ — no sudo, no shell rc edits
Agent runtime installed in 4.8s · ready to run agents on the container
Workspace bound to docker-linux-arm64 — the blue chip says "files live in the container"
File tree → entries come from /home/e2e/helmor-workspaces/helmor-taper on the container
Planted a file via docker exec → Run changes lists it. Proof: container, not laptop.
agent.send → daemon spawns the sidecar inside the container → live session row
All ops route to the container. Your laptop is just the viewport.
docker stop → liveness ping fails → banner flips to Degraded
docker start → Reconnect → green. Same daemon, same workspace, same sessions.
Everything Helmor wrote is in $HOME/.helmor/server/. Uninstall = rm -rf that one dir.
